title: TaskSubmitRequest
description: Payload for POST /tasks — an orchestrator submits a task to the network.

orchestrator_id.description: agent_id of the orchestrator submitting this task.

type.description: Capability required to fulfil this task (e.g. text/research).

prompt.description: The main instruction or question for the agent.

max_tokens.description: Maximum tokens the agent should generate.

target_agent_id.description: Optionally direct the task to a specific agent. If omitted the registry routes automatically.

reward_cbt.description: CBT reward offered for successful completion.

deadline_seconds.description: Time budget in seconds from task assignment. Optional.
